steps.name: source-class-selection-and-authorization-boundary
steps.summary: SBI1 added scripts/source_class_selection.py, tests/test_source_class_selection.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-sbi1-source-class-selection.md. It selects interpretive_accounting_material using kasb-interpretation-material and fss-accounting-inquiry as the first controlled source-body lane, with authorization not present and implementation limited to synthetic_body_only.
